text:
*[Bug 19003] New: The aarch64 Windows R build has wrong 'Built' field for base and recommended packages*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=19003>

            Bug ID: 19003
           Summary: The aarch64 Windows R build has wrong 'Built' field
                    for base and recommended packages
           Product: R
           Version: R-devel (trunk)
          Hardware: Other
                OS: Windows 64-bit
            Status: UNCONFIRMED
          Severity: normal
          Priority: P5
         Component: Misc
          Assignee: <mailto:R-core@R-project.org|R-core@R-project.org>
          Reporter: <mailto:csardi.gabor@gmail.com|csardi.gabor@gmail.com>

```
> R.Version()$version.string
[1] "R Under development (unstable) (2026-02-10 r89394 ucrt)"
> R.Version()$platform
[1] "aarch64-w64-mingw32"
> packageDescription("stats")$Built
[1] "R 4.6.0; x86_64-w64-mingw32; 2026-02-11 07:48:49 UTC; windows"
> packageDescription("Matrix")$Built
[1] "R 4.6.0; x86_64-w64-mingw32; 2026-02-11 07:45:06 UTC; windows"
```
